textPlain: Damn, I don't have the time. I've been reading for 20 minutes and I really need to get back to work, haha.I love how this blog post describes a use after free, all its limitations and then next steps to deal with all of it. In many cases this would be like a 2 to 4 part blog post but this just all is written in one go. I could keep my attention span for about half of it. This would be fun to recreate in a course or something. Also, I didn't know you could slow down the execution time of certain code.
